title: IT131R2 ARCHIVED - Convention expenses - Canada.ca
content:
## IT131R2 ARCHIVED - Convention expenses

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin explains the deduction provided in computing income of a taxpayer carrying on a business or practising a profession, in respect of expenses incurred in attending conventions.

- Read the publication Online format it131r2-e.html
